title: Mini Alien Figures 20Pcs Alien Figurine Glow in the Dark Tiny Alien Toy 10 Styles Resin Alien Figure Alien Party Favors for Kids, Alien Figure
features: Glow-in-the-Dark: Experience the enchantment as these tiny alien figurines captures sunlight by day and come to life in the dark! Made with glow-in-the-dark resin, these aliens add an extra of fun to playtime. Turn off the lights and watch as your alien friends illuminate the room.

Kid-Friendly Resin Material: Crafted from safe and resin material, these alien figurines are kid-friendly and built to withstand the rigors of play. The smooth finish ensures a tactile delight, and the vibrant colors captivate young minds.

Alien Party Favors Ideal Gift : Hosting an alien-themed party? These mini figures make fantastic party favors. Surprise your little guests with a pocket-sized alien friend to take home, ensuring your party is an unforgettable hit. Our Mini Alien Figures Set sparks joy and creativity, making it an ideal present for birthdays, holidays, or just because.

Pocket-Sized Playmates: With a compact size, these mini alien figures are perfect for on-the-go play. Toss them in a backpack, pocket, or carry them in the car for entertainment wherever your child goes.

Whimsical Alien Fun: Our set includes a whopping 20 mini alien figures in 10 different styles, providing an abundance of characters for endless imaginative play. Make your own alien colony, arrange them in exciting poses, or let the kids invent captivating stories with their newfound extraterrestrial friends.
description: Description: Dive into the extraterrestrial realm with our set of 20 Mini Alien Figures. Perfect for sparking imagination and creativity in kids, these whimsical alien toys are ready to take your little ones on an interstellar adventure. Unleash the cosmic charm and bring a galaxy of fun to your child's playtime with the Mini Glow-in-the-Dark Alien Figures Set of 20. Watch as their imagination takes flight into outer space!
